category_title: Students with ASD who exhibit school avoidance or distress during schedule changes
minimal_context: The student is instructed to join a peer group in the high school classroom to engage in a collaborative social activity.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: It is time for the group project. Please go join your assigned peer group.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I don't want to go over there. Kids are not nice from my experience.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: You need to work with your classmates for this assignment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I might say someone in class is my friend, but I don't do anything with people alone.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just go sit with them and try to participate.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Exhibits varying degrees of aggression) No! If I am in a situation with them, the other kids will bully me and test me, and there will be fights!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: It is time for the group project. Please go join your assigned peer group.

STUDENT: I don't want to go over there. Kids are not nice from my experience.

TUTOR: You need to work with your classmates for this assignment.

STUDENT: I might say someone in class is my friend, but I don't do anything with people alone.

TUTOR: Just go sit with them and try to participate.

STUDENT: (Exhibits varying degrees of aggression) No! If I am in a situation with them, the other kids will bully me and test me, and there will be fights!
